transcript: Hello? Hello? Is anyone there? I think someone's watching me. I'm scared. I don't know what to do. I don't know what's happening. I'm so confused. I don't understand, there's these people or images I see, I just don't know, they're everywhere, they follow me, I know this might seem crazy but it's true, you have to help me, please help me, I don't know where else to go. Are you there? Don't worry, Holly. It's okay. I'm right here for you. Don't be so shy. It's okay. Open your blinds, so I can see who I'm talking to. You know that's rude. Stop! Hello? Who's there? I can't come to the door! Go away! I want to go home! Go away! I want to go home! I want to go home! I want to go you, Holly But I know who he is He's out there He. He'll get you, Holly. But you have to trust me so I can stop him. Do you understand? Don't come near me. Please, get away. Please, listen to me, Holly. He's after you, Holly. I know how you feel. He stalked me too. Don't worry, I won't let him hurt you. Trust me. Please trust me, Holland. I've seen you. You've been watching me. Why have you been watching me? I've been watching him. Not you. He's been watching. Waiting. He stalked me too. Until I made him go away. How? I just stalked him back. Gave him a bit of a taste of his own medicine. I suppose he doesn't think that anyone can stalk him. But he's wrong. I want to stop him before he... Before what? Before he killed me. To stop him, I had to do what he did to me. But in the meantime, I ended up stalking you. I'm so sorry, Holly. i didn't mean to scare you where is he now outside i'll protect you where is he i'm scared you should be What have you done? I've done holding a fake arm. Holly! Holly! Dumb holy faggot! Holly! Holly! It's okay, he's dead. Impossible! Holly, Holly, it's alright. He won't hurt you now. The eyes of the watcher are no longer there. Okay. Anyway, I'm going to carry on. It's over now. Close his eyes, please. Close his eyes. His eyes are shut
